column1: # Val Ark - OS install media / router firmware / netboot catalog
# Freely-redistributable images for PXE / network commissioning of the mesh.
# Verified HTTP 200 (versions current as of 2026-06). The link-repair loop
# re-resolves "current"/"latest" dirs, so dated paths self-heal.
#   value     intrinsic importance 0-1000 (NOT size; planner derives value/byte)
#   category  diversity axis: netboot | os-install | router-firmware | jetson-bsp
